dataset_note: MVTec AD bottle is CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 and is not bundled in this package.

benchmark_reports.claim: Real Anomalib PaDiM MVTec AD bottle fit/test metrics.
CPU classical patch-difference baseline on the same local MVTec AD bottle split.

export_reports.claim: Trained Anomalib PaDiM checkpoint prediction and ONNX/OpenVINO export attempts.
Trained exported PaDiM ONNX/OpenVINO artifacts load but parity is not clean.
Phase 0 placeholder OpenVINO parity drift characterization.

dataset_reports.claim: Dataset source, checksum, license, local path, and split counts.

reproduction_commands: PYTHONPATH=src python3 scripts/run_anomalib_baseline.py --method padim --dataset mvtec_ad --category bottle --dataset-root ~/datasets --device cpu --output reports/verification/anomalib_padim_mvtec_ad_bottle_result.json --work-dir artifacts/verification/anomalib

PYTHONPATH=src python3 scripts/predict_anomaly.py --backend anomalib_padim --input ~/datasets/mvtec_ad/bottle/test/good/000.png --dataset-root ~/datasets --dataset mvtec_ad --category bottle --output reports/verification/prediction_padim_good_000.json

PYTHONPATH=src python3 scripts/predict_anomaly.py --backend anomalib_padim --input ~/datasets/mvtec_ad/bottle/test/broken_large/000.png --dataset-root ~/datasets --dataset mvtec_ad --category bottle --output reports/verification/prediction_padim_broken_large_000.json
primary_limitations: Trained PaDiM export parity is not clean.
Evidence covers MVTec AD bottle only.
